response: At the Drive-In and Muse share the commonality of being English rock bands. Muse is an English rock band from Teignmouth, Devon, formed in 1994, consisting of Matt Bellamy (lead vocals, guitar, piano, keyboards), Chris Wolstenholme (bass guitar, backing vocals, keyboards), and Dominic Howard (drums, percussion). At the Drive-In is also an English rock band from El Paso, Texas, formed in 1994, consisting of Cedric Bixler (vocals), Omar Rodríguez (guitar, vocals), Paul Hinojos (bass), Tony Hajjar (drums), and Keeley Davis (guitar, vocals). Both bands are known for their contributions to the rock music genre.
